prose:
Frontier-orbital analysis of aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms) computed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard') using PySCF. Single-point calculation on the user-supplied aniline.xyz geometry; no geometry relaxation was performed at the DFT level. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-center two-electron integrals (no density fitting). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: trustworthy = true (all checks passed).

Key results:
  HOMO (index 24): −5.553772 eV
  LUMO (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:    5.3048177 eV  ← headline value

Additional frontier orbitals:
  HOMO−2 (index 22): −8.4041702 eV
  HOMO−1 (index 23): −6.8461949 eV
  LUMO+1 (index 26): +0.30750756 eV
  LUMO+2 (index 27): +0.77617648 eV

Koopmans-theorem quantities (orbital-energy approximations):
  Vertical IP = 5.553772 eV
  Vertical EA = 0.2489544 eV
  Electronegativity = 2.9013632 eV
  Chemical hardness = 2.6524088 eV
  Chemical softness = 0.37701579 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index = 1.5868422 eV

Total electronic energy: −287.71578 Hartree (−7829.1453 eV). Output JSON: aniline_frontier_dft_b3lyp_def2tzvp.json. CLI: cli.py frontier aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
